name: Berger Paints India Limited
summary: Berger Paints India Limited is a leading paint manufacturer in India, producing a wide range of decorative and industrial paints, coatings, and related products; the company is based in Kolkata, India. They offer products for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. Berger Paint’s business model involves manufacturing and distributing paints and coatings through a network of dealers and retailers.
